dialogos.texto_en: (Afterwards, we arrived at American Village,\n reunited with everyone, and enjoyed a luxurious\n American-style meat dish for dinner.)
(Nino and I were somehow able\n to understand each other's feelings, yet...)
(There are still some parts\n that I'm not satisfied with.)
(As Nino put it, during this trip,\n maybe I was the one who was\n always being approached by her.)
(Originally, I planned to show Nino the kind of man I am%p-2;――%p; \n to be the one who tries to approach her.)
(But in the end, we haven't even kissed,\n so it can't end like this.)
Uesugi-san, sorry for keeping you waiting.\nI went and called everyone.
Yeah, thanks, Yotsuba.\nI'm sorry for making you do that.
It's a secret you are sharing with Nino,\nso it must be the result of your discussion, huh.
Judging from the atmosphere at dinner,\nit looks like the problem had been solved.
Yeah, thanks to you guys.\nI'm grateful that you gave me some time with her.
Well, that's no issue.\nWe also had some thoughts on our side.
Anyway, it seems like Nino and you have become\neven more lovey-dovey. As expected, Uesugi-san,\nwhen you decide to do something, you really do it!
No, that's not it.
Huh?
It's thanks to Nino that the problem was solved.\nShe made the time for us to talk, right?\nI'm not satisfied with that as a man.
Is it like, a man's pride, or something?
Well, yeah.\nYou can think of it that way.
You like to show off, don't you, Futaro.
Quiet...
So, anyway, I have a request for you guys.
What is it?\nIf I can do it, of course I'll help!
We have plans to tour Ocean Expo Park tomorrow,\nbut I want to spend it just with Nino.
I know it's selfish of me.\nBut this is not just for Nino,\nit's also for our graduation trip with you guys.
Even so, please. That's what I want.
Come on, you don't have to lower your head like that!
I'm okay with it.\nPlease make a lot of memories with Nino.
I'm okay too.
Over the past three days,\nwe've all made enough memories together.
We'll have fun ourselves, including Raiha-chan.\nPlease don't worry about us, and spend some time with Nino.
You guys...\nI really appreciate it.
Don't worry about it.\nIt's for the sake of our cute little sister too.
Also, from our perspective, it's not a bad thing\nto be able to watch you guys\nendlessly indulging in each other's love, right?
Yeah, we'll get statisfied just watching you two.
Please enjoy your lovey-dovey time together\nto the fullest, as long as we can't see it. Teehee.
Nah, c'mon, we haven't really done anything\nthat significant, have we?
Now, I wonder...
(Well, now that we have their permission,\n we need to quickly come up with a plan for tomorrow.)
(For the sake of the ultimate moment with Nino!)
